context_text: Then she came out again to the Munchkins and said: "I am anxious to get back to my aunt and uncle, for I am sure they will worry about me.
normalized_context_text: Then she came out again to the Munchkins and said: "I am anxious to get back to my aunt and uncle, for I am sure they will worry about me.
original_context_text: Then she came out again to the Munchkins and said: "I am anxious to get back to my aunt and [[uncle]], for I am sure they will worry about me.
rendered_context_text: Then she came out again to the Munchkins and said: "I am anxious to get back to my aunt and uncle, for I am sure they will worry about me.
subject: your uncle

context_text: If you, who are Great and Terrible, cannot kill her yourself, how do you expect me to do it?" "I do not know," said the Head; "but that is my answer, and until the Wicked Witch dies you will not see your uncle and aunt again.
